rules.name: project-frontmatter-schema-edit
rules.evidence: index.md — YAML frontmatter (title, date, location, coordinates, type, tags, featured, authors) + Markdown body

rules.name: project-frontmatter-schema-write
rules.evidence: index.md — YAML frontmatter (title, date, location, coordinates, type, tags, featured, authors) + Markdown body

uncompilable: Development Commands table lists available pnpm scripts with no attached obligation, prohibition, or ordering — usage catalog, not a rule
"Package manager: pnpm (locked to 9.12.0). Node.js 20+ required." is an environment prerequisite, not bindable to a specific tool call
Content System section (project directory layout) is descriptive architecture documentation with no obligation language
Data Loading section describing +page.server.js routing pattern is descriptive, not a constraint on future edits
Key Utilities section is a descriptive catalog of existing helper modules
Styling section (Tailwind config, dark mode, font) states existing facts with no obligation attached
"All custom components use Ak prefix" is a descriptive naming observation, not phrased as an instruction, and no components directory path is given to scope a Write/Edit trigger
Build & Deployment section (adapter-static, base path, prerender/trailingSlash config) is descriptive of existing build configuration, not a constraint on edits
Internationalization section (locale file location, RTL detection) is descriptive of existing i18n setup
"No test framework configured." is informational, not an action-bindable rule
